activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit Exception Not Applicable
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Eurotrade' from the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice as 'SKF Eurotrade AB' including matching address and country Sweden. Allowed normalization of company form (AB) applies. Land matches exactly. Rule 4.1.0 allows consignor name present anywhere in invoice, confirmed in invoice header and issuer info.

consignee.invoice_value:
EGYPTIAN ENGINEERING CO.
B4 Piece 23-Industrial City
7064518 10th of Ramadan city
Egypt
consignee.motivation: Consignee exactly matches in certificate and invoice in the 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' fields including full address and country Egypt. Country matches exactly. Prioritization of 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' verified per 4.2.0.

goods_description.motivation: General goods description 'HOUSING INCL BRG(SE)' in certificate matches 'HOUSING INCL BRG' in invoice. Certificate contains explicit invoice reference number 8500028201 and invoice date 22.01.2026 matching the invoice. Thus, per rule 4.3.5 verification through invoice reference is accepted.

quantity.certificate_value:
131,600 KG Gross Weight
123,300 KG Net Weight
1 package
quantity.invoice_value:
Total Gross Weight 131,600 KG
Total Net Weight 123,300 KG
Quantity 20
quantity.motivation: Quantity and weight in certificate: 1 package, 131,600 KG Gross Weight and 123,300 KG Net Weight. Invoice shows total quantities 20 units with 123,300 KG Net Weight and 131,600 KG Gross Weight matching certificate weights exactly. The certificate indicates one package, while the invoice details 20 units; allowed as shipment unit and weight verified separately. Weight category and numeric values match within exact limits, per rules 4.4.3.2 and 4.4.4.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'Sweden' in certificate exactly matches 'Sweden' in invoice. EU origin normalization applies as certificate AND invoice reference European Union. Sweden is an EU member country at certificate issue date. No conflicting origin countries found in invoice. Rule 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2 applied.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin) match between the certificate and invoice with allowed normalization and explicit invoice references. No mismatches or manual review triggers found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
